pairs.en: Wednesday, January 28, 2026 at 5:30 p.m. ET
pairs.zh:
2026年1月28日星期三，美国东部时间下午5:30

Wednesday, January 28, 2026 at 5:30 p.m. ET

pairs.en: Call participants
pairs.zh: 呼叫参与者

pairs.en: Chairman and Chief Executive Officer — Satya Nadella
pairs.zh: 董事长兼首席执行官 — 萨蒂亚·纳德拉

pairs.en: Chief Financial Officer — Amy Hood
pairs.zh: 首席财务官 - 艾米·胡德

pairs.en: Chief Accounting Officer — Alice Jolla
pairs.zh: 首席会计官 — 艾丽丝·乔拉

pairs.en: Corporate Secretary and Deputy General Counsel — Keith Dolliver
pairs.zh:
公司秘书兼副总法律顾问 — Keith Dolliver

Corporate Secretary and Deputy General Counsel — Keith Dolliver

pairs.en: Corporate Vice President, Investor Relations — Jonathan Neilson
pairs.zh:
公司副总裁，投资者关系 — Jonathan Neilson

Corporate Vice President, Investor Relations — Jonathan Neilson

pairs.en: Total revenue-- $81.3 billion, up 17% in constant currency, driven by growth across core commercial businesses.
pairs.zh:
总收入——813亿美元，按固定汇率计算增长17%，受核心商业业务增长驱动。

Total revenue-- $81.3 billion, up 17% in constant currency, driven by growth across core commercial businesses.

pairs.en: Operating income-- Increased by 21% in constant currency, reflecting both higher revenue and improved operating leverage.
pairs.zh:
营业利润——按固定汇率计算增长了21%，反映出收入增加和经营杠杆改善。

Operating income-- Increased by 21% in constant currency, reflecting both higher revenue and improved operating leverage.

pairs.en: EPS-- $4.14, up 24% in constant currency when adjusted for OpenAI’s impact, indicating substantial bottom-line expansion.
pairs.zh:
EPS-- $4.14，经OpenAI影响调整后按固定汇率计算上涨24%，表明盈利能力大幅扩张。
EPS-- $4.14, up 24% in constant currency when adjusted for OpenAI’s impact, indicating substantial bottom-line expansion.

pairs.en: Microsoft Cloud revenue-- $51.5 billion, up 26% in constant currency, marking the first time the cloud business surpassed $50 billion in a quarter.
pairs.zh:
微软云收入——515亿美元，按固定汇率计算同比增长26%，标志着该云业务首次单季突破500亿美元。

Microsoft Cloud revenue-- $51.5 billion, up 26% in constant currency, marking the first time the cloud business surpassed $50 billion in a quarter.

pairs.en: Gross margin percentage-- 68%, slightly lower year over year, primarily due to continued AI infrastructure investments and higher AI product usage.
pairs.zh:
毛利率百分比——68%，同比略微下降，主要由于持续的AI基础设施投资及更高的AI产品使用率。

原文：
Gross margin percentage-- 68%, slightly lower year over year, primarily due to continued AI infrastructure investments and higher AI product usage.

pairs.en: Operating expenses-- Rose 5% in constant currency, attributed to R&D in compute capacity, AI talent, and impairment charges in gaming.
pairs.zh:
运营费用——按固定汇率计算上升5%，归因于计算能力的研发投入、人工智能人才以及游戏业务的减值费用。

Operating expenses-- Rose 5% in constant currency, attributed to R&D in compute capacity, AI talent, and impairment charges in gaming.

pairs.en: Capital expenditures-- $37.5 billion, with roughly two-thirds on short-lived assets such as GPUs and CPUs; finance leases accounted for $6.7 billion, mainly for large data centers.
pairs.zh:
资本支出——375亿美元，其中大约三分之二用于短期资产，例如GPUs和CPUs；融资租赁占67亿美元，主要用于大型数据中心。

Capital expenditures-- $37.5 billion, with roughly two-thirds on short-lived assets such as GPUs and CPUs; finance leases accounted for $6.7 billion, mainly for large data centers.

pairs.en: Cash flow from operations-- $35.8 billion, up 60%, benefiting from robust cloud billings and collections.
pairs.zh:
经营活动现金流——358亿美元，同比增长60%，得益于强劲的cloud billings和收款。

原文：Cash flow from operations-- $35.8 billion, up 60%, benefiting from robust cloud billings and collections.

pairs.en: Free cash flow-- $5.9 billion, fell sequentially due to higher capital expenditures weighed by a lower mix of finance leases.
pairs.zh:
自由现金流——$5.9 billion，由于更高的资本支出（受融资租赁组合下降影响）而环比下降。  
Free cash flow-- $5.9 billion, fell sequentially due to higher capital expenditures weighed by a lower mix of finance leases.

pairs.en: Capital return-- $12.7 billion returned to shareholders via dividends and repurchases, up 32% year over year.
pairs.zh:
资本回报——通过股息和回购向股东返还127亿美元，同比增长32%。
Capital return-- $12.7 billion returned to shareholders via dividends and repurchases, up 32% year over year.

pairs.en: Commercial bookings-- Increased 23% in constant currency, propelled by large, multi-year Azure and Anthropic commitments, and broad-based annuity growth.
pairs.zh:
商业预订——按固定汇率计算增长23%，得益于Azure和Anthropic的大型多年期承诺以及广泛的年金增长。

Commercial bookings-- Increased 23% in constant currency, propelled by large, multi-year Azure and Anthropic commitments, and broad-based annuity growth.

pairs.en: Commercial remaining performance obligation (RPO)-- Rose to $625 billion, up 11%; 45% ($281 billion estimated) attributed to OpenAI contracts, remainder grew 28% with broad customer and product diversification.
pairs.zh:
商业剩余履约义务（RPO）-- 上升至6250亿美元，增长11%；其中45%（估计为2810亿美元）归因于OpenAI合同，其余部分增长28%，客户和产品多样化广泛。

Commercial remaining performance obligation (RPO)-- Rose to $625 billion, up 11%; 45% ($281 billion estimated) attributed to OpenAI contracts, remainder grew 28% with broad customer and product diversification.

pairs.en: Productivity and business processes revenue-- $34.1 billion, up 16% in constant currency, supported by Microsoft 365 Copilot and E5 momentum.
pairs.zh:
生产力和业务流程收入——$34.1 billion，按固定汇率计算增长16%，受Microsoft 365 Copilot和E5势头支撑。

Productivity and business processes revenue-- $34.1 billion, up 16% in constant currency, supported by Microsoft 365 Copilot and E5 momentum.

pairs.en: Microsoft 365 commercial cloud revenue-- Grew 17% in constant currency; Microsoft 365 commercial seats rose 6% to over 450 million.
pairs.zh:
Microsoft 365 商业云收入——按固定汇率计算增长17%；Microsoft 365 商业席位增长6%，超过450 million。

Microsoft 365 commercial cloud revenue-- Grew 17% in constant currency; Microsoft 365 commercial seats rose 6% to over 450 million.

pairs.en: LinkedIn revenue-- Increased 11% in constant currency, led by marketing solutions performance.
pairs.zh:
LinkedIn营收——按固定汇率计算增长11%，由marketing solutions业绩带动。  
LinkedIn revenue-- Increased 11% in constant currency, led by marketing solutions performance.

pairs.en: Dynamics 365 revenue-- Rose 19% in constant currency, with ongoing workload expansion.
pairs.zh:
Dynamics 365收入——在固定汇率基础上增长19%，且工作负载持续扩展。

Dynamics 365 revenue-- Rose 19% in constant currency, with ongoing workload expansion.

pairs.en: Intelligent cloud revenue-- $32.9 billion, up 29% in constant currency; Azure and other cloud services up 39%.
pairs.zh:
智能云收入——$32.9 billion，按固定汇率计算增长29%；Azure和其他云服务增长39%。  
Intelligent cloud revenue-- $32.9 billion, up 29% in constant currency; Azure and other cloud services up 39%.

pairs.en: On-premises server revenue-- Increased 21% in constant currency, leveraging hybrid solutions and SQL Server 2025 launch.
pairs.zh:
本地服务器收入——在固定汇率基础上增长21%，得益于混合解决方案和SQL Server 2025的发布。

On-premises server revenue-- Increased 21% in constant currency, leveraging hybrid solutions and SQL Server 2025 launch.

pairs.en: More personal computing revenue-- $14.3 billion, down 3%, as gaming declined and Windows OEM growth moderated.
pairs.zh:
个人计算业务收入为143亿美元，同比下降3%，原因是游戏业务下滑以及Windows OEM增长放缓。

More personal computing revenue-- $14.3 billion, down 3%, as gaming declined and Windows OEM growth moderated.

pairs.en: Windows 11 users-- Surpassed 1 billion, up over 45% year over year, setting a significant adoption milestone.
pairs.zh:
Windows 11用户——突破10亿，同比增长超过45%，达到了一个重要的采纳里程碑。

Windows 11 users-- Surpassed 1 billion, up over 45% year over year, setting a significant adoption milestone.

pairs.en: Fabric annualized revenue run rate-- Exceeded $2 billion, with over 31,000 customers and revenue up 60% year over year.
pairs.zh:
Fabric年化营收运行率——超过20亿美元，拥有超过31,000名客户，营收同比增长60%。

Fabric annualized revenue run rate-- Exceeded $2 billion, with over 31,000 customers and revenue up 60% year over year.

pairs.en: Microsoft 365 Copilot paid seats-- 15 million, with over 160% seat growth and a tripled number of customers with over 35,000 seats.
pairs.zh:
Microsoft 365 Copilot付费席位——1500万，席位增长超过160%，拥有超过35000个席位的客户数量增加了两倍。

Microsoft 365 Copilot paid seats-- 15 million, with over 160% seat growth and a tripled number of customers with over 35,000 seats.

pairs.en: GitHub Copilot subscribers-- 4.7 million paid, up 75% year over year; individual Copilot Pro Plus subscriptions grew 77% sequentially.
pairs.zh:
GitHub Copilot订阅用户——付费用户470万，同比增长75%；个人Copilot Pro Plus订阅用户环比增长77%。

GitHub Copilot subscribers-- 4.7 million paid, up 75% year over year; individual Copilot Pro Plus subscriptions grew 77% sequentially.

pairs.en: Capital guidance-- Fiscal third-quarter revenue expected between $80.65 billion and $81.75 billion, with FX contributing approximately three percentage points to growth.
pairs.zh:
资本指引——第三财季营收预计在806.5亿至817.5亿美元之间，外汇对增长的贡献约为三个百分点。

Capital guidance-- Fiscal third-quarter revenue expected between $80.65 billion and $81.75 billion, with FX contributing approximately three percentage points to growth.

pairs.en: Fiscal 2026 outlook-- Company now expects full-year operating margins to rise slightly, aided by first-half investment prioritization and revenue mix shifts.
pairs.zh:
2026财年展望——公司现在预计全年营业利润率将小幅上升，得益于上半年的投资优先级调整和收入组合变化。

Fiscal 2026 outlook-- Company now expects full-year operating margins to rise slightly, aided by first-half investment prioritization and revenue mix shifts.

pairs.en: Chief Financial Officer Hood highlighted, "gross margin percentage was 68%, down slightly year over year, primarily driven by continued investments in AI infrastructure and growing AI product usage," noting these costs outpaced efficiency gains.
pairs.zh:
首席财务官Hood强调：“毛利率百分比为68%，同比略有下降，主要原因是持续投资于AI基础设施以及AI产品使用量的增长。”他指出这些成本的增长超过了效率提升带来的收益。

原文：Chief Financial Officer Hood highlighted, "gross margin percentage was 68%, down slightly year over year, primarily driven by continued investments in AI infrastructure and growing AI product usage," noting these costs outpaced efficiency gains.

pairs.en: Microsoft guided "Operating margins should be down slightly year over year." for the next quarter, citing continued investments in AI and rising operating expenses.
pairs.zh:
微软指导称下一季度“运营利润率应同比略有下降”，理由是持续投资于AI以及运营费用上升。

Microsoft guided "Operating margins should be down slightly year over year." for the next quarter, citing continued investments in AI and rising operating expenses.

pairs.en: "gaming, revenue decreased 9% in constant currency," and "Xbox content and services revenue decreased 5%," with both results "below expectations driven by first-party content with impact across the platform."
pairs.zh:
"游戏业务，按固定汇率计算收入下降9%，"以及"Xbox内容和服务收入下降5%，"这两个结果"低于预期，原因是第一方内容对整个平台产生了影响。"

原文："gaming, revenue decreased 9% in constant currency," and "Xbox content and services revenue decreased 5%," with both results "below expectations driven by first-party content with impact across the platform."

pairs.en: The company cautioned that increased memory pricing "would impact capital expenditures" and may "create additional volatility" in both Windows OEM and server transactional purchasing going forward.
pairs.zh:
该公司警告称，内存价格上涨"将影响资本支出"，并可能"造成额外波动"，影响未来Windows OEM和服务器交易采购。

The company cautioned that increased memory pricing "would impact capital expenditures" and may "create additional volatility" in both Windows OEM and server transactional purchasing going forward.

pairs.en: Microsoft(MSFT+5.25%)delivered double-digit topline and bottom-line expansion, driven by accelerating cloud growth, rapid AI adoption, and resilient multi-year commitments across key enterprise workloads. Commercial RPO and bookings registered robust advances, fueled by both OpenAI partnerships and diversified sector demand, while Azure and Microsoft 365 Copilot contributions extended the addressable opportunity across productivity and developer segments. Custom silicon innovation, exemplified by the Maya 200 accelerator and substantial AI/ML infrastructure investment, illustrates Microsoft’s competitive stance on the AI utility stack as well as its approach to capacity constraint amid record customer demand. Operating cash flow and capital return outperformed, yet management cautioned on near-term margin compression from sustained investment cycles, heavier CapEx, and pressure within gaming and consumer-exposed businesses.
pairs.zh:
微软(MSFT+5.25%)实现双位数营收与利润增长，得益于云业务加速增长、AI快速普及以及关键企业工作负载领域的多年期韧性承诺。商业合同负债和订单受OpenAI合作及多元化行业需求驱动实现强劲增长，同时Azure和Microsoft 365 Copilot的贡献拓展了生产力与开发者领域的可寻址市场。以Maya 200加速器和大规模AI/ML基础设施投资为代表的定制芯片创新，彰显了微软在AI效用栈上的竞争地位，以及在创纪录客户需求下的产能约束应对策略。经营现金流和资本回报表现超预期，但管理层警告称，持续投资周期、更高资本支出以及游戏和消费者业务面临的压力，可能导致近期利润率压缩。

Microsoft(MSFT+5.25%) delivered double-digit topline and bottom-line expansion, driven by accelerating cloud growth, rapid AI adoption, and resilient multi-year commitments across key enterprise workloads. Commercial RPO and bookings registered robust advances, fueled by both OpenAI partnerships and diversified sector demand, while Azure and Microsoft 365 Copilot contributions extended the addressable opportunity across productivity and developer segments. Custom silicon innovation, exemplified by the Maya 200 accelerator and substantial AI/ML infrastructure investment, illustrates Microsoft’s competitive stance on the AI utility stack as well as its approach to capacity constraint amid record customer demand. Operating cash flow and capital return outperformed, yet management cautioned on near-term margin compression from sustained investment cycles, heavier CapEx, and pressure within gaming and consumer-exposed businesses.

pairs.en: Chief Executive Officer Nadella identified tokens per watt per dollar as a new key infrastructure optimization metric in the AI era, citing a "50% increase in throughput" on OpenAI inferencing due to infrastructure advances.
pairs.zh:
首席执行官Nadella将每瓦特每美元生成的token数确定为AI时代新的关键基础设施优化指标，并引用基础设施进步使OpenAI推理的吞吐量提升了50%。

原文：Chief Executive Officer Nadella identified tokens per watt per dollar as a new key infrastructure optimization metric in the AI era, citing a "50% increase in throughput" on OpenAI inferencing due to infrastructure advances.

pairs.en: Maya 200, Microsoft's new custom accelerator, delivers over 30% TCO improvement versus prior fleet hardware and is being deployed for both inferencing and synthetic data generation use cases.
pairs.zh:
Maya 200，微软的新定制加速器，相比之前的集群硬件实现了超过30%的TCO改进，并且正在部署用于推理和合成数据生成用例。

Maya 200, Microsoft's new custom accelerator, delivers over 30% TCO improvement versus prior fleet hardware and is being deployed for both inferencing and synthetic data generation use cases.

pairs.en: Productivity gains from Copilot AI, with average user conversations doubling and daily active users increasing 10x, signal substantial customer base engagement and deeper enterprise penetration.
pairs.zh:
Copilot AI带来的生产力提升，用户平均对话量翻倍，日活跃用户增长10倍，表明客户基础参与度显著提高，企业渗透进一步加深。

Productivity gains from Copilot AI, with average user conversations doubling and daily active users increasing 10x, signal substantial customer base engagement and deeper enterprise penetration.

pairs.en: Paid commercial seat growth for Microsoft 365 Copilot and a rising number of large deployments (over 35,000 seats) highlight significant enterprise adoption, with notable wins among multinational clients.
pairs.zh:
Microsoft 365 Copilot的付费商业席位增长以及大规模部署（超过35,000个席位）数量的增加，突显了企业在采用方面的显著进展，尤其是在跨国客户中取得了显著成功。

Paid commercial seat growth for Microsoft 365 Copilot and a rising number of large deployments (over 35,000 seats) highlight significant enterprise adoption, with notable wins among multinational clients.

pairs.en: On the developer front, GitHub Copilot Pro Plus individual subscriptions increased 77% sequentially, and enterprise platform adoption broadened.
pairs.zh:
在开发者方面，GitHub Copilot Pro Plus个人订阅量环比增长77%，企业平台采用范围扩大。

On the developer front, GitHub Copilot Pro Plus individual subscriptions increased 77% sequentially, and enterprise platform adoption broadened.

pairs.en: Fabric, described as the "fastest-growing analytics platform," expanded annualized run rate to over $2 billion, driven by over 31,000 enterprise clients and 60% revenue growth.
pairs.zh:
Fabric，被称为“增长最快的分析平台”，将其年化运行率扩大至超过20亿美元，得益于超过31,000家企业客户和60%的收入增长。

Fabric, described as the "fastest-growing analytics platform," expanded annualized run rate to over $2 billion, driven by over 31,000 enterprise clients and 60% revenue growth.

pairs.en: Management outlined that much of the CapEx is already contracted, mitigating risk to hardware monetization throughout its useful life—especially for GPU investments linked to long-duration Azure deals.
pairs.zh:
管理层指出，大部分资本支出已签订合同，从而降低了硬件在其使用寿命内的货币化风险——尤其是与长期Azure交易相关的GPU投资。

Management outlined that much of the CapEx is already contracted, mitigating risk to hardware monetization throughout its useful life—especially for GPU investments linked to long-duration Azure deals.

pairs.en: Gaming was singled out for underperformance, experiencing sequential and year-over-year revenue declines atypical for the reporting period.
pairs.zh:
游戏业务被指出表现不佳，其环比和同比收入均出现下滑，这在报告期内并不常见。

原文：
Gaming was singled out for underperformance, experiencing sequential and year-over-year revenue declines atypical for the reporting period.

pairs.en: Management forecast continued downward pressure on gross margin from AI spending; however, full-year operating margins are projected to improve modestly as product mix shifts toward higher-value categories.
pairs.zh:
管理层预测，来自AI支出的毛利率将继续面临下行压力；然而，随着产品组合转向更高价值的类别，全年营业利润率预计将温和改善。

Management forecast continued downward pressure on gross margin from AI spending; however, full-year operating margins are projected to improve modestly as product mix shifts toward higher-value categories.

pairs.en: Industry glossary
pairs.zh: 行业术语

pairs.en: Tokens per watt per dollar: An infrastructure metric for AI workloads expressing processing throughput (measured in tokens generated or processed) as a function of both energy (watts) and capital cost (dollars), used to optimize efficiency and ROI in AI datacenter operations.
pairs.zh:
每瓦每美元代币数：一种用于AI工作负载的基础设施指标，表示处理吞吐量（以生成或处理的代币数衡量）与能源（瓦特）和资本成本（美元）的函数关系，用于优化AI数据中心运营中的效率和投资回报率。

原文：
Tokens per watt per dollar: An infrastructure metric for AI workloads expressing processing throughput (measured in tokens generated or processed) as a function of both energy (watts) and capital cost (dollars), used to optimize efficiency and ROI in AI datacenter operations.

pairs.en: Remaining performance obligation (RPO): The total contracted revenue Microsoft expects to recognize in the future from current agreements (excluding some cancellations or contract modifications), a key measure of backlog for SaaS and cloud vendors.
pairs.zh:
剩余履约义务（RPO）：微软预计从现有合同中未来确认的总合同收入（不包括部分取消或合同修改），这是SaaS和云供应商积压订单的关键衡量指标。

Remaining performance obligation (RPO): The total contracted revenue Microsoft expects to recognize in the future from current agreements (excluding some cancellations or contract modifications), a key measure of backlog for SaaS and cloud vendors.

pairs.en: Fabric: Microsoft’s analytics platform combining real-time, operational, and analytical data in a unified system to enable enterprise AI workload orchestration at scale.
pairs.zh:
Fabric: 微软的分析平台，将实时、运营和分析数据整合到一个统一系统中，以实现企业级AI工作负载的大规模编排。

原文：Fabric: Microsoft’s analytics platform combining real-time, operational, and analytical data in a unified system to enable enterprise AI workload orchestration at scale.

pairs.en: Foundry: Microsoft’s AI and data services platform enabling customers to build, deploy, and customize AI agents using a catalog of large language and AI models, device orchestration, and model fine-tuning capabilities.
pairs.zh:
Foundry: 微软的AI和数据服务平台，允许客户通过大型语言模型和AI模型目录、设备编排以及模型微调功能来构建、部署和定制AI代理。

Foundry: Microsoft’s AI and data services platform enabling customers to build, deploy, and customize AI agents using a catalog of large language and AI models, device orchestration, and model fine-tuning capabilities.

pairs.en: Maya 200: Microsoft’s proprietary AI accelerator hardware, optimized for large-scale inferencing applications, offering improved TCO and performance benchmarks compared to previous-generation fleet hardware.
pairs.zh:
Maya 200：Microsoft专有AI加速器硬件，针对大规模推理应用进行了优化，与前一代集群硬件相比，提供了改进的TCO和性能基准。

原文：Maya 200: Microsoft’s proprietary AI accelerator hardware, optimized for large-scale inferencing applications, offering improved TCO and performance benchmarks compared to previous-generation fleet hardware.

pairs.en: Full Conference Call Transcript
pairs.zh: 完整的电话会议记录

pairs.en: Jonathan Neilson:Good afternoon, and thank you for joining us today. On the call with me are Satya Nadella, Chairman and Chief Executive Officer; Amy Hood, Chief Financial Officer; Alice Jolla, Chief Accounting Officer; and Keith Dolliver, Corporate Secretary and Deputy General Counsel. On the Microsoft Corporation Investor Relations website, you can find our earnings press release and financial summary slide deck, which is intended to supplement our prepared remarks during today's call and provides the reconciliation of differences between GAAP and non-GAAP financial measures. More detailed outlook slides will be available on the Microsoft Corporation Investor Relations website when we provide Outlook commentary on today's call. On this call, we will discuss certain non-GAAP items.
pairs.zh:
Jonathan Neilson：下午好，感谢大家今天参与我们的会议。与我一同出席电话会议的有：Satya Nadella（董事长兼首席执行官）、Amy Hood（首席财务官）、Alice Jolla（首席会计官）以及Keith Dolliver（公司秘书兼副总法律顾问）。在Microsoft Corporation投资者关系网站上，您可以找到我们的财报新闻稿和财务摘要幻灯片，这些材料旨在补充我们今天电话会议上的准备发言，并提供GAAP与非GAAP财务指标之间的差异调整。当我们在今天的电话会议中提供展望评论时，Microsoft Corporation投资者关系网站上还将提供更详细的展望幻灯片。在本次电话会议中，我们将讨论某些非GAAP项目。

Jonathan Neilson:Good afternoon, and thank you for joining us today. On the call with me are Satya Nadella, Chairman and Chief Executive Officer; Amy Hood, Chief Financial Officer; Alice Jolla, Chief Accounting Officer; and Keith Dolliver, Corporate Secretary and Deputy General Counsel. On the Microsoft Corporation Investor Relations website, you can find our earnings press release and financial summary slide deck, which is intended to supplement our prepared remarks during today's call and provides the reconciliation of differences between GAAP and non-GAAP financial measures. More detailed outlook slides will be available on the Microsoft Corporation Investor Relations website when we provide Outlook commentary on today's call. On this call, we will discuss certain non-GAAP items.

They are included as additional clarifying items to aid in further understanding the company's second quarter performance in addition to the impact these items and events have on the financial results. All growth comparisons we make on the call today relate to the corresponding period of last year unless otherwise noted. We will also provide growth rates in constant currency when available, as a framework for assessing how our underlying businesses performed, excluding the effect of foreign currency rate fluctuations.

所提供的非GAAP财务指标不应被视为替代或优于按照GAAP编制的财务业绩指标。这些指标作为额外的澄清项目，旨在帮助进一步理解公司第二季度的业绩表现，以及这些项目和事件对财务结果的影响。除非另有说明，我们今天电话会议中提及的所有增长比较均与去年同期相关。我们也会在可用时提供固定汇率的增长率，作为评估基础业务表现（排除外汇汇率波动影响）的框架。
