pairs.en: Satya Nadella:the Microsoft Corporation Cloud surpassed $50 billion in revenue for the first time, up 26% year over year, reflecting the strength of our platform and accelerating demand. We are in the beginning phases of AI diffusion and its broad GDP impact. TAM will grow substantially across every layer of the tech stack as this diffusion accelerates and spreads. In fact, even in this early innings, we have built an AI business that is larger than some of our biggest franchises that took decades to build. Today, I'll focus my remarks across the three layers of our stack: Cloud and Token Factory, agent platform, and high-value agentic experiences.
pairs.zh:
Satya Nadella：Microsoft Corporation Cloud营收首次突破$50 billion，同比增长26%，体现了我们平台的实力和加速增长的需求。我们正处于AI扩散及其对GDP广泛影响的初期阶段。随着这种扩散加速和蔓延，TAM将在技术栈的每一层大幅增长。事实上，即使在这个早期阶段，我们已经建立了一个AI业务，其规模超过了一些我们花费数十年打造的最大业务。今天，我将重点介绍我们技术栈的三个层面：Cloud and Token Factory、agent platform和高价值的agentic experiences。

Satya Nadella:the Microsoft Corporation Cloud surpassed $50 billion in revenue for the first time, up 26% year over year, reflecting the strength of our platform and accelerating demand. We are in the beginning phases of AI diffusion and its broad GDP impact. TAM will grow substantially across every layer of the tech stack as this diffusion accelerates and spreads. In fact, even in this early innings, we have built an AI business that is larger than some of our biggest franchises that took decades to build. Today, I'll focus my remarks across the three layers of our stack: Cloud and Token Factory, agent platform, and high-value agentic experiences.

pairs.en: When it comes to our cloud and token factory, the key to long-term competitiveness is shaping our infrastructure to support new high-scale workloads. We are building this infrastructure out for the heterogeneous and distributed nature of these workloads, ensuring the right fit with the geographic and segment-specific needs for all customers, including the long tail. The key metric we are optimizing for is tokens per watt per dollar, which comes down to increasing utilization and decreasing TCO using silicon systems and software. A good example of this is the 50% increase in throughput we were able to achieve in one of our highest volume workloads, OpenAI inferencing, powering our co-pilots.
pairs.zh:
关于我们的云和token factory，长期竞争力的关键在于塑造我们的基础设施以支持新的高规模工作负载。我们正在针对这些工作负载的异构性和分布式特性来构建这一基础设施，确保满足所有客户（包括长尾客户）的地理和细分特定需求。我们优化的关键指标是每瓦特每美元的tokens，这归结为通过硅片系统和软件提高利用率并降低TCO。一个很好的例子是，我们在最高工作负载之一OpenAI inferencing（为其提供我们的co-pilots动力）中实现了50%的吞吐量提升。

When it comes to our cloud and token factory, the key to long-term competitiveness is shaping our infrastructure to support new high-scale workloads. We are building this infrastructure out for the heterogeneous and distributed nature of these workloads, ensuring the right fit with the geographic and segment-specific needs for all customers, including the long tail. The key metric we are optimizing for is tokens per watt per dollar, which comes down to increasing utilization and decreasing TCO using silicon systems and software. A good example of this is the 50% increase in throughput we were able to achieve in one of our highest volume workloads, OpenAI inferencing, powering our co-pilots.

pairs.en: And another example was the unlocking of new capabilities and efficiencies for our Fairwater data centers. In this instance, we connect both Atlanta and Wisconsin sites through an AI WAN to build a first-of-kind AI super factory. Fairwater's two-story design and liquid cooling allow us to run higher GPU density and thereby improve both performance and latencies for high-scale training. All up, we added nearly one gigawatt of total capacity this quarter alone. At the silicon layer, we have NVIDIA and AMD and our own Maya chips delivering the best all-up fleet performance, cost, and supply across multiple generations of hardware. Earlier this week, we brought online our Maya 200 accelerator.
pairs.zh:
另一个例子是，我们为Fairwater数据中心解锁了新的功能和效率。在此案例中，我们通过AI WAN连接了亚特兰大和威斯康星两地的站点，打造了首个此类AI超级工厂。Fairwater的两层设计及液冷技术使我们能够运行更高的GPU密度，从而在规模化训练中提升性能和降低延迟。总体而言，仅本季度我们就新增了近十亿瓦的总容量。在芯片层面，我们拥有NVIDIA、AMD以及自研Maya芯片，可在多代硬件中实现最佳的机队整体性能、成本和供应。本周早些时候，我们上线了Maya 200加速器。

And another example was the unlocking of new capabilities and efficiencies for our Fairwater data centers. In this instance, we connect both Atlanta and Wisconsin sites through an AI WAN to build a first-of-kind AI super factory. Fairwater's two-story design and liquid cooling allow us to run higher GPU density and thereby improve both performance and latencies for high-scale training. All up, we added nearly one gigawatt of total capacity this quarter alone. At the silicon layer, we have NVIDIA and AMD and our own Maya chips delivering the best all-up fleet performance, cost, and supply across multiple generations of hardware. Earlier this week, we brought online our Maya 200 accelerator.

pairs.en: Maya 200 delivers 10 plus flops at FP4 precision with over 30% improved TCO compared to the latest generation hardware in our fleet. We will be scaling this starting with inferencing and synthetic data gen for our superintelligence team as well as doing inferencing for Copilot and Foundry. And given AI workloads are not just about AI accelerators, but also consume large amounts of compute, we are pleased with the progress we are making on the CPU side as well. Cobalt 200 is another big leap forward delivering over 50% higher performance compared to our first custom-built processor for cloud-native workloads. Sovereignty is increasingly top of mind for customers, and we are expanding our solutions and global footprint to match.
pairs.zh:
Maya 200在FP4精度下提供10 plus flops，与我们的最新一代硬件相比，TCO提升超过30%。我们将从为我们的超级智能团队提供推理和合成数据生成开始扩展这一技术，同时也会为Copilot和Foundry提供推理服务。鉴于AI工作负载不仅涉及AI加速器，还需要消耗大量算力，我们对CPU方面取得的进展感到满意。Cobalt 200是又一次重大飞跃，与我们的第一款为云原生工作负载定制的处理器相比，性能提升超过50%。主权问题越来越受到客户的关注，我们正在扩大解决方案和全球覆盖范围以与之匹配。

原文：
Maya 200 delivers 10 plus flops at FP4 precision with over 30% improved TCO compared to the latest generation hardware in our fleet. We will be scaling this starting with inferencing and synthetic data gen for our superintelligence team as well as doing inferencing for Copilot and Foundry. And given AI workloads are not just about AI accelerators, but also consume large amounts of compute, we are pleased with the progress we are making on the CPU side as well. Cobalt 200 is another big leap forward delivering over 50% higher performance compared to our first custom-built processor for cloud-native workloads. Sovereignty is increasingly top of mind for customers, and we are expanding our solutions and global footprint to match.

pairs.en: We announced DC investments in seven countries this quarter alone supporting local data residency needs. And we offer the most comprehensive set of sovereignty solutions across public, private, and national partner clouds so customers can choose the right approach for each workload with the local control they require. Next, I want to talk about the agent platform. Like in every platform shift, all software is being rewritten. A new app platform is being born. You can think of agents as the new apps. And to build, deploy, and manage agents, customers will need a model catalog, tuning services, harness for orchestration, services for context engineering, AI safety, management observability, and security. It starts with having broad model choice.
pairs.zh:
我们仅在当季度就在七个国家宣布了数据中心投资，以支持当地数据驻留需求。同时，我们提供了最全面的主权解决方案，涵盖公共云、私有云以及国家合作伙伴云，让客户能够根据每个工作负载的需求，选择合适的方法并获得所需的本地控制权。接下来，我想谈谈代理平台。如同每一次平台变革，所有软件都在被重写。一个新的应用程序平台正在诞生。你可以将代理视为新的应用。为了构建、部署和管理代理，客户需要模型目录、调优服务、编排工具、上下文工程服务、AI安全、管理可观测性以及安全性。这一切都始于广泛的模型选择。

原文：
We announced DC investments in seven countries this quarter alone supporting local data residency needs. And we offer the most comprehensive set of sovereignty solutions across public, private, and national partner clouds so customers can choose the right approach for each workload with the local control they require. Next, I want to talk about the agent platform. Like in every platform shift, all software is being rewritten. A new app platform is being born. You can think of agents as the new apps. And to build, deploy, and manage agents, customers will need a model catalog, tuning services, harness for orchestration, services for context engineering, AI safety, management observability, and security. It starts with having broad model choice.

pairs.en: Our customers expect to use multiple models as part of any workload that they can fine-tune and based on cost, latency, and performance requirements. And we offer the broadest selection of models of any hyperscaler. This quarter, we added support for GPT-5.0.2 as well as Claude 4.5. Already over 1,500 customers have used both Anthropic and OpenAI models on Foundry. We are seeing increasing demand for region-specific models, including and Cohere as more customers look for Sovereign AI choices. And we continue to invest in our first-party models, which are optimized to address the highest value customer scenarios, such as coding, and security. As part of Foundry, we also give customers the ability to customize and fine-tune models.
pairs.zh:
我们的客户期望在任意工作负载中使用多个模型，以便根据成本、延迟和性能要求进行微调。我们提供了所有超大规模云服务商中最广泛的模型选择。本季度，我们新增了对GPT-5.0.2以及Claude 4.5的支持。已有超过1,500名客户在Foundry上同时使用了Anthropic和OpenAI的模型。随着越来越多的客户寻求Sovereign AI选项，对特定区域模型（包括和Cohere）的需求正在增长。我们继续投资于自研模型，这些模型针对编码、安全等最高价值的客户场景进行了优化。作为Foundry的一部分，我们还赋予客户自定义和微调模型的能力。

Our customers expect to use multiple models as part of any workload that they can fine-tune and based on cost, latency, and performance requirements. And we offer the broadest selection of models of any hyperscaler. This quarter, we added support for GPT-5.0.2 as well as Claude 4.5. Already over 1,500 customers have used both Anthropic and OpenAI models on Foundry. We are seeing increasing demand for region-specific models, including and Cohere as more customers look for Sovereign AI choices. And we continue to invest in our first-party models, which are optimized to address the highest value customer scenarios, such as coding, and security. As part of Foundry, we also give customers the ability to customize and fine-tune models.

pairs.en: Increasingly, customers want to be able to capture the tacit knowledge they possess inside of model weights as their core IP. This is probably the most important sovereign consideration for firms as AI diffuses more broadly across our GDP in every firm needs to protect their enterprise value. For agents to be effective, they need to be grounded in enterprise data and knowledge. That means connecting their agents to systems of record and operational data, analytical data, as well as semi-structured and unstructured production and communications data. And this is what we are doing with our unified IQ layer spanning fabric foundry, and data powering Microsoft Corporation 365.
pairs.zh:
越来越多的客户希望将模型权重中蕴含的隐性知识作为其核心知识产权（IP）进行捕捉。随着人工智能更广泛地渗透到GDP中，对于每家企业而言，这可能是最重要的主权考虑因素——它们需要保护自己的企业价值。要让智能体（agents）发挥作用，它们需要扎根于企业数据与知识。这意味着要将智能体连接到记录系统和运营数据、分析数据，以及半结构化和非结构化的生产和通信数据。而这正是我们通过统一的智能层（涵盖fabric foundry和驱动Microsoft Corporation 365的数据）所做的事情。

Increasingly, customers want to be able to capture the tacit knowledge they possess inside of model weights as their core IP. This is probably the most important sovereign consideration for firms as AI diffuses more broadly across our GDP in every firm needs to protect their enterprise value. For agents to be effective, they need to be grounded in enterprise data and knowledge. That means connecting their agents to systems of record and operational data, analytical data, as well as semi-structured and unstructured production and communications data. And this is what we are doing with our unified IQ layer spanning fabric foundry, and data powering Microsoft Corporation 365.

pairs.en: In the world of context engineering, foundry knowledge and fabric are gaining momentum. Foundry knowledge delivers better context with automated source routing and advanced agentic retrieval while respecting user permissions. And Fabric brings together end-to-end operations real-time, and analytical data. Two years since it became broadly available, Fabrik's annual revenue run rate is now over $2 billion with over 31,000 customers, and it continues to be the fastest-growing analytics platform on the market with revenue up 60% year over year. All up, the number of customers spending $1 million plus per quarter on foundry grew nearly 80% driven by strong growth in every industry.
pairs.zh:
在语境工程领域，Foundry Knowledge和Fabric正日益受到关注。Foundry Knowledge通过自动化源路由和高级智能检索，在尊重用户权限的同时提供更优质的语境。而Fabric则将端到端运营、实时和分析数据整合在一起。自Fabrik全面上线两年以来，其年化经常性收入已超过20亿美元，拥有超过31,000家客户，且收入同比增长60%，持续成为市场上增长最快的分析平台。总体而言，在各大行业强劲增长的推动下，每季度在Foundry上支出超过100万美元的客户数量增长了近80%。

In the world of context engineering, foundry knowledge and fabric are gaining momentum. Foundry knowledge delivers better context with automated source routing and advanced agentic retrieval while respecting user permissions. And Fabric brings together end-to-end operations real-time, and analytical data. Two years since it became broadly available, Fabrik's annual revenue run rate is now over $2 billion with over 31,000 customers, and it continues to be the fastest-growing analytics platform on the market with revenue up 60% year over year. All up, the number of customers spending $1 million plus per quarter on foundry grew nearly 80% driven by strong growth in every industry.

pairs.en: And over 250 customers are on track to process over 1 trillion tokens on Foundry this year. There are many great examples of customers using all of this capability on Foundry to build their own agentic systems. Alaska Airlines is creating natural language flight search. BMW is speeding up design cycles. Land O'Lakes is enabling precision farming for co-op members and Symphony AI. Is addressing bottlenecks in the CPG industry. And of course, Foundry remains a powerful on-ramp for the entire cloud. The vast majority of Foundry customers use additional Azure solutions like developer services, app services, databases as they scale. Beyond fabric and foundry, we're also addressing agent building by knowledge workers with Copilot Studio and AgentBuilder.
pairs.zh:
今年有超过250家客户有望在Foundry上处理超过1万亿tokens。许多客户正利用Foundry上的全部功能构建自己的智能系统，涌现出大量精彩案例。Alaska Airlines正在创建自然语言航班搜索，BMW正在加速设计周期，Land O'Lakes正在为合作社成员实现精准农业，Symphony AI正在解决CPG行业的瓶颈问题。当然，Foundry依然是通往整个云生态的强大入口。绝大多数Foundry客户在扩展规模时，还会使用额外的Azure解决方案，如开发者服务、应用服务和数据库。除了Fabric和Foundry，我们还通过Copilot Studio和AgentBuilder，帮助知识工作者构建智能体。

原文：
And over 250 customers are on track to process over 1 trillion tokens on Foundry this year. There are many great examples of customers using all of this capability on Foundry to build their own agentic systems. Alaska Airlines is creating natural language flight search. BMW is speeding up design cycles. Land O'Lakes is enabling precision farming for co-op members and Symphony AI. Is addressing bottlenecks in the CPG industry. And of course, Foundry remains a powerful on-ramp for the entire cloud. The vast majority of Foundry customers use additional Azure solutions like developer services, app services, databases as they scale. Beyond fabric and foundry, we're also addressing agent building by knowledge workers with Copilot Studio and AgentBuilder.

pairs.en: Over 80% of the Fortune 500 have active agents built using these low-code, no-code tools. As agents proliferate, every customer will need new ways to deploy, manage, and protect them. We believe this creates a major new category and significant growth opportunity for us. This quarter, we introduced Agent 365, which makes it easy for organizations to extend their existing governance, identity, security, and management to agents. That means the same controls they already use across Microsoft Corporation 365 and Azure now extend to agents they build and deploy on our cloud or any other cloud. And partners like Adobe, Databricks, Genspaw, Glean, NVIDIA, SAP, ServiceNow, and Workday are already integrating agent 365.
pairs.zh:
超过80%的财富世界500强企业已使用这些低代码、无代码工具构建了活跃的智能体。随着智能体的普及，每一位客户都需要新的方式来部署、管理和保护它们。我们相信，这将为我们创造一个重要的新品类和巨大的增长机遇。本季度，我们推出了Agent 365，使组织能够轻松地将现有的治理、身份、安全和管理功能扩展到智能体。这意味着他们已在Microsoft Corporation 365和Azure中使用的相同控制措施，现在也适用于他们在我们的云或任何其他云上构建和部署的智能体。而Adobe、Databricks、Genspaw、Glean、NVIDIA、SAP、ServiceNow和Workday等合作伙伴已经在集成Agent 365。

Over 80% of the Fortune 500 have active agents built using these low-code, no-code tools. As agents proliferate, every customer will need new ways to deploy, manage, and protect them. We believe this creates a major new category and significant growth opportunity for us. This quarter, we introduced Agent 365, which makes it easy for organizations to extend their existing governance, identity, security, and management to agents. That means the same controls they already use across Microsoft Corporation 365 and Azure now extend to agents they build and deploy on our cloud or any other cloud. And partners like Adobe, Databricks, Genspaw, Glean, NVIDIA, SAP, ServiceNow, and Workday are already integrating agent 365.

pairs.en: We are the first provider to offer this type of agent control plane across clouds. Now let's turn to the high-value agentic experiences we are building. AI experiences are intent-driven and are beginning to work at task scope. We are entering an age of macro delegation and micro steering across domains. Intelligence using multiple models is built into multiple form factors. You see this in chat, in new agent inbox, apps, coworker scaffoldings, agent workflows embedded in applications and IDEs that are used every day, or even in our command line with file system access and skills. That's the approach we are taking with our first-party family of copilot spanning key domains.
pairs.zh:
我们是首个在跨云环境中提供此类代理控制平面的供应商。现在，让我们转向我们正在构建的高价值代理体验。AI体验由意图驱动，并开始在任务范围内发挥作用。我们正在进入一个跨领域宏观委托与微观操控的时代。使用多种模型的智能被内置到多种形态因素中。你可以在聊天、新的代理收件箱、应用、同事框架、嵌入在日常使用的应用和IDE中的代理工作流，甚至在我们具有文件系统访问和技能的命令行中看到这一点。这就是我们在一系列覆盖关键领域的第一方Copilot家族中所采取的方法。

We are the first provider to offer this type of agent control plane across clouds. Now let's turn to the high-value agentic experiences we are building. AI experiences are intent-driven and are beginning to work at task scope. We are entering an age of macro delegation and micro steering across domains. Intelligence using multiple models is built into multiple form factors. You see this in chat, in new agent inbox, apps, coworker scaffoldings, agent workflows embedded in applications and IDEs that are used every day, or even in our command line with file system access and skills. That's the approach we are taking with our first-party family of copilot spanning key domains.

pairs.en: In consumer, for example, Copilot experiences span chat, news, feed, search, creation, browsing, shopping, and integrations into the operating system, and it's gaining momentum. Daily users of our Copilot app increased nearly 3x year over year. And with Copilot Checkout, we have partnered with PayPal Shopify, and Stripe so customers can make purchases directly within the app. With Microsoft Corporation 365 Copilot, we are focused on organization-wide productivity. WorkIQ takes the data underneath Microsoft Corporation 365 and creates the most valuable stateful agent for every organization. It delivers powerful reasoning capabilities over people, their roles, their artifacts, their communications, and their history and memory all within an organization's security boundary.
pairs.zh:
在消费领域，例如，Copilot体验覆盖聊天、新闻、信息流、搜索、创作、浏览、购物以及与操作系统的集成，并且势头正劲。我们Copilot应用的日活跃用户同比增长近3倍。借助Copilot Checkout，我们已与PayPal、Shopify和Stripe合作，让用户可以直接在应用内完成购买。通过Microsoft Corporation 365 Copilot，我们专注于提升整个组织的生产力。WorkIQ利用Microsoft Corporation 365底层数据，为每个组织创建最有价值的有状态代理。它在组织安全边界内，对人员、角色、工作产物、沟通记录以及历史与记忆提供强大的推理能力。

In consumer, for example, Copilot experiences span chat, news, feed, search, creation, browsing, shopping, and integrations into the operating system, and it's gaining momentum. Daily users of our Copilot app increased nearly 3x year over year. And with Copilot Checkout, we have partnered with PayPal Shopify, and Stripe so customers can make purchases directly within the app. With Microsoft Corporation 365 Copilot, we are focused on organization-wide productivity. WorkIQ takes the data underneath Microsoft Corporation 365 and creates the most valuable stateful agent for every organization. It delivers powerful reasoning capabilities over people, their roles, their artifacts, their communications, and their history and memory all within an organization's security boundary.

pairs.en: Microsoft Corporation 365 Copilot's accuracy and powered by WorkIQ is unmatched, delivering faster and more accurate work grounded results than competition. And we have seen our biggest quarter-over-quarter improvement in response quality to date. This has driven record usage intensity with the average number of conversations per user doubling year over year, Microsoft Corporation 365 Copilot also is becoming a true daily habit with daily active users increasing 10x year over year. We're also seeing strong momentum with Researcher Agent, which supports both OpenAI and Claude, as well as Agent Mode in Excel, PowerPoint, and Word. All up, it was a record quarter for Microsoft Corporation 365 Copilot seat ads up over 160% year over year.
pairs.zh:
Microsoft Corporation 365 Copilot的准确性和由WorkIQ驱动的能力无与伦比，相比竞争对手能提供更快、更精准的工作成果。我们在响应质量上实现了迄今为止最大的季度环比提升。这推动了创纪录的使用强度，每位用户的平均对话数同比增长了一倍，Microsoft Corporation 365 Copilot也正在成为真正的日常习惯，日活跃用户同比增长了10倍。我们还看到Researcher Agent的强劲势头，该代理支持OpenAI和Claude，同时Excel、PowerPoint和Word中的Agent Mode也有良好表现。总的来说，这是Microsoft Corporation 365 Copilot创纪录的一个季度，席位新增同比增长超过160%。

Microsoft Corporation 365 Copilot's accuracy and powered by WorkIQ is unmatched, delivering faster and more accurate work grounded results than competition. And we have seen our biggest quarter-over-quarter improvement in response quality to date. This has driven record usage intensity with the average number of conversations per user doubling year over year, Microsoft Corporation 365 Copilot also is becoming a true daily habit with daily active users increasing 10x year over year. We're also seeing strong momentum with Researcher Agent, which supports both OpenAI and Claude, as well as Agent Mode in Excel, PowerPoint, and Word. All up, it was a record quarter for Microsoft Corporation 365 Copilot seat ads up over 160% year over year.

pairs.en: We saw accelerating seat growth quarter over quarter and now have 15 million paid Microsoft Corporation 365 Copilot seats and multiples more enterprise chat users. And we are seeing larger commercial deployments. The number of customers with over 35,000 seats tripled year over year. Fiserv, ING, NAST, University of Kentucky, University of Manchester, US Department of Interior, and Westpac all purchased over 35,000 seats. Publicis alone purchased over 95,000 seats for nearly all its employees. We are also taking share in Dynamics 365 with built-in agents across the entire suite.
pairs.zh:
我们看到季度环比席位增长加速，目前已有1500万付费的Microsoft Corporation 365 Copilot席位，以及数倍于此的企业聊天用户。我们还看到了更大规模的商业部署。拥有超过35,000个席位的客户数量同比增长了三倍。Fiserv、ING、NAST、University of Kentucky、University of Manchester、US Department of Interior和Westpac均购买了超过35,000个席位。仅Publicis一家就为其几乎所有员工购买了超过95,000个席位。我们还在整个Dynamics 365套件中通过内置代理占据了市场份额。

We saw accelerating seat growth quarter over quarter and now have 15 million paid Microsoft Corporation 365 Copilot seats and multiples more enterprise chat users. And we are seeing larger commercial deployments. The number of customers with over 35,000 seats tripled year over year. Fiserv, ING, NAST, University of Kentucky, University of Manchester, US Department of Interior, and Westpac all purchased over 35,000 seats. Publicis alone purchased over 95,000 seats for nearly all its employees. We are also taking share in Dynamics 365 with built-in agents across the entire suite.

pairs.en: A great example of this is how Weesa is turning customer conversations data into knowledge articles with our knowledge management agent in Dynamics, and how Sandrik is using our sales qualification agent to automate lead qualification across tens and thousands of potential customers. In coding, we are seeing strong growth across all paid GitHub Copilot. Copilot Pro Plus subs for individual devs increased 77% quarter over quarter, and all up now, we have 4.7 million paid Copilot subscribers, up 75% year over year. Siemens, for example, is going all in on GitHub, adopting the full platform to increase developer productivity after a successful Copilot rollout to 30,000 plus developers.
pairs.zh:
一个很好的例子是，Weesa如何利用我们在Dynamics中的知识管理代理，将客户对话数据转化为知识文章；以及Sandrik如何使用我们的销售资格代理，在成千上万的潜在客户中自动化线索资格认定。在编程方面，我们看到所有付费GitHub Copilot产品都实现了强劲增长。面向个人开发者的Copilot Pro Plus订阅量环比增长77%，截至目前，我们共有470万付费Copilot用户，同比增长75%。例如，Siemens全面采用GitHub平台，在成功向3万多名开发者推广Copilot后，进一步提升了开发效率。

原文：
A great example of this is how Weesa is turning customer conversations data into knowledge articles with our knowledge management agent in Dynamics, and how Sandrik is using our sales qualification agent to automate lead qualification across tens and thousands of potential customers. In coding, we are seeing strong growth across all paid GitHub Copilot. Copilot Pro Plus subs for individual devs increased 77% quarter over quarter, and all up now, we have 4.7 million paid Copilot subscribers, up 75% year over year. Siemens, for example, is going all in on GitHub, adopting the full platform to increase developer productivity after a successful Copilot rollout to 30,000 plus developers.

pairs.en: GitHub AgentHQ is the organizing layer for all coding agents like Anthropic, OpenAI, Google, Cognition, and xAI in the context of customers' GitHub repos. With Copilot CLI and Versus Code, we offer developers the full spectrum of form factors and models they need for AI-first coding workflows. And when you add WorkIQ as a skill or an MCP to our developer workflow, it's a game changer. Surfacing more context like emails, meetings, docs, projects, messages, and more. You can simply ask the agent to plan and execute changes to your code base based on an update to a spec in SharePoint or using the transcript of your last engineering and design meeting in Teams.
pairs.zh:
GitHub AgentHQ是所有编码代理（如Anthropic、OpenAI、Google、Cognition和xAI）在客户GitHub仓库环境中的组织层。通过Copilot CLI和Versus Code，我们为开发者提供AI优先编码工作流所需的全方位形态和模型。当你在我们的开发者工作流中添加WorkIQ作为技能或MCP时，这将带来革命性的改变——它能够呈现更多上下文信息，如电子邮件、会议记录、文档、项目、消息等。你只需让代理根据SharePoint中的规格更新，或根据Teams上最近工程和设计会议的转录内容，来规划和执行代码库的变更。

GitHub AgentHQ is the organizing layer for all coding agents like Anthropic, OpenAI, Google, Cognition, and xAI in the context of customers' GitHub repos. With Copilot CLI and Versus Code, we offer developers the full spectrum of form factors and models they need for AI-first coding workflows. And when you add WorkIQ as a skill or an MCP to our developer workflow, it's a game changer. Surfacing more context like emails, meetings, docs, projects, messages, and more. You can simply ask the agent to plan and execute changes to your code base based on an update to a spec in SharePoint or using the transcript of your last engineering and design meeting in Teams.

pairs.en: And we're going beyond that with GitHub Copilot SDK. Developers can now embed the same runtime behind Copilot CLI, multimodal, multistep planning tools MCP integration, OAuth streaming directly into their applications. In security, we added a dozen new and updated security Copilot agents across Defender, Entra, Intune, and Purview. For example, iCertus' SOC team used Security Copilot Agent to reduce manual triage time by 75%, which is a real game changer in an industrial facing a severe talent shortage. To make it easier for security teams to onboard, we are rolling out security Copilot to all our e5 customers, and our security solutions are also becoming essential to manage organizations' AI deployments.
pairs.zh:
我们更进一步，推出了GitHub Copilot SDK。开发者现在可以将Copilot CLI、多模态、多步骤规划工具MCP集成、OAuth流背后的相同运行时直接嵌入到他们的应用程序中。在安全方面，我们在Defender、Entra、Intune和Purview中新增和更新了十几个安全Copilot代理。例如，iCertus的SOC团队使用Security Copilot Agent将手动分类时间减少了75%，这在面临严重人才短缺的行业中是一个真正的变革。为了让安全团队更容易上手，我们正在向所有E5客户推出Security Copilot，同时我们的安全解决方案也成为管理企业AI部署的关键。

And we're going beyond that with GitHub Copilot SDK. Developers can now embed the same runtime behind Copilot CLI, multimodal, multistep planning tools MCP integration, OAuth streaming directly into their applications. In security, we added a dozen new and updated security Copilot agents across Defender, Entra, Intune, and Purview. For example, iCertus' SOC team used Security Copilot Agent to reduce manual triage time by 75%, which is a real game changer in an industrial facing a severe talent shortage. To make it easier for security teams to onboard, we are rolling out security Copilot to all our e5 customers, and our security solutions are also becoming essential to manage organizations' AI deployments.

pairs.en: 24 billion copilot interactions were audited by Purview this quarter, up 9x year over year. Finally, I want to talk about two additional high-impact agentic experiences. First, in health care, Dragon Corp. Pilot is the leader in its category, helping over 100,000 medical providers automate their workflows. Mount Sinai Health is now moving to a system-wide Dragon Copilot deployment providers after a successful trial with its primary care physicians. All up, we helped document 21 million patient encounters this quarter, up 3x year over year. And second, when it comes to science and engineering, companies like Unilever and Consumer Goods and Synopsys and EDA are using Microsoft Corporation Discovery to orchestrate specialized agents for R and D end to end.
pairs.zh:
本季度Purview审计了240亿次Copilot交互，同比增长9x。最后，我想谈谈另外两个高影响力的智能体体验。首先是医疗领域，Dragon Corp. Pilot是该类别的领导者，帮助超过10万名医疗提供者实现工作流程自动化。Mount Sinai Health在与其初级保健医生成功试运行后，现在正将Dragon Copilot部署扩展至整个医疗系统。总体而言，本季度我们协助记录了2100万次患者就诊，同比增长3x。其次，在科学与工程领域，Unilever与Consumer Goods以及Synopsys与EDA等公司正在使用Microsoft Corporation Discovery来编排用于端到端研发的专用智能体。

24 billion copilot interactions were audited by Purview this quarter, up 9x year over year. Finally, I want to talk about two additional high-impact agentic experiences. First, in health care, Dragon Corp. Pilot is the leader in its category, helping over 100,000 medical providers automate their workflows. Mount Sinai Health is now moving to a system-wide Dragon Copilot deployment providers after a successful trial with its primary care physicians. All up, we helped document 21 million patient encounters this quarter, up 3x year over year. And second, when it comes to science and engineering, companies like Unilever and Consumer Goods and Synopsys and EDA are using Microsoft Corporation Discovery to orchestrate specialized agents for R and D end to end.

pairs.en: They're able to reason over scientific literature and internal knowledge formulate hypotheses, spin up simulations, and continuously iterate to drive new discoveries. Beyond AI, we continue to invest in all our core franchises and meet the needs of our customers and partners, and we are seeing strong progress. For example, when it comes to cloud migrations, our new SQL Server has over 2x the IaaS adoption of the previous version. In security, we now have 1.6 million security customers, including over a million who use four or more of our workloads. Windows reached a big milestone, 1 billion Windows 11 users, up over 45% year over year.
pairs.zh:
他们能够基于科学文献和内部知识进行推理，提出假设，构建模拟，并持续迭代以推动新发现。在人工智能之外，我们持续投资所有核心业务，满足客户和合作伙伴的需求，并看到了强劲的进展。例如，在云迁移方面，新版SQL Server的IaaS采用率是上一版本的2倍以上。在安全领域，我们拥有160万安全客户，其中超过100万客户使用四个或更多工作负载。Windows达到了一个重要里程碑，拥有10亿Windows 11用户，同比增长超过45%。

They're able to reason over scientific literature and internal knowledge formulate hypotheses, spin up simulations, and continuously iterate to drive new discoveries. Beyond AI, we continue to invest in all our core franchises and meet the needs of our customers and partners, and we are seeing strong progress. For example, when it comes to cloud migrations, our new SQL Server has over 2x the IaaS adoption of the previous version. In security, we now have 1.6 million security customers, including over a million who use four or more of our workloads. Windows reached a big milestone, 1 billion Windows 11 users, up over 45% year over year.

pairs.en: And we had share gains this quarter across Windows, Edge, and Bing, double-digit member growth in LinkedIn with 30% growth in paid video ads. And in gaming, we are committed to delivering great games across Xbox, PC, cloud, and every other device, and we saw record PC players and paid streaming hours on Xbox. In closing, we feel very good about how we are delivering for customers today and building the full stack to capture the opportunity ahead. With that, let me turn it over to Amy to walk through our financial results and outlook, and I look forward to rejoining for your questions.
pairs.zh:
本季度，我们在Windows、Edge和Bing上均实现了市场份额增长，LinkedIn会员数达到两位数增长，其中付费视频广告增长30%。在游戏领域，我们致力于通过Xbox、PC、云及其他所有设备提供优质游戏，并见证了Xbox的PC玩家数量和付费流媒体时长创下纪录。最后，我们对当前为客户提供的服务以及为把握未来机遇所构建的全栈能力感到非常满意。接下来，有请Amy为大家介绍我们的财务业绩和展望，我期待稍后回来回答各位的问题。

And we had share gains this quarter across Windows, Edge, and Bing, double-digit member growth in LinkedIn with 30% growth in paid video ads. And in gaming, we are committed to delivering great games across Xbox, PC, cloud, and every other device, and we saw record PC players and paid streaming hours on Xbox. In closing, we feel very good about how we are delivering for customers today and building the full stack to capture the opportunity ahead. With that, let me turn it over to Amy to walk through our financial results and outlook, and I look forward to rejoining for your questions.

pairs.en: Amy Hood:Thank you, Satya, and good afternoon, everyone. With growing demand for our offerings and focused execution by our sales teams, we again exceeded expectations across revenue, operating income, and earnings per share while investing to fuel long-term growth. This quarter, revenue was $81.3 billion, up 17% in constant currency. Gross margin dollars increased 16% in constant currency, while operating income increased 21% in constant currency. Earnings per share was $4.14, an increase of 24% in constant currency when adjusted for the impact from our investment in OpenAI. And FX increased reported results slightly less than expected particularly in intelligent cloud revenue.
pairs.zh:
Amy Hood：谢谢，Satya，大家下午好。随着我们产品需求的增长以及销售团队的专注执行，我们在营收、营业利润和每股收益方面再次超出预期，同时持续投资以推动长期增长。本季度，营收为813亿美元，按固定汇率计算增长17%。毛利率按固定汇率计算增长16%，营业利润按固定汇率计算增长21%。每股收益为4.14美元，经调整我们于OpenAI投资的影响后，按固定汇率计算增长24%。外汇对报告业绩的积极影响略低于预期，尤其在智能云收入方面。

Amy Hood:Thank you, Satya, and good afternoon, everyone. With growing demand for our offerings and focused execution by our sales teams, we again exceeded expectations across revenue, operating income, and earnings per share while investing to fuel long-term growth. This quarter, revenue was $81.3 billion, up 17% in constant currency. Gross margin dollars increased 16% in constant currency, while operating income increased 21% in constant currency. Earnings per share was $4.14, an increase of 24% in constant currency when adjusted for the impact from our investment in OpenAI. And FX increased reported results slightly less than expected particularly in intelligent cloud revenue.

pairs.en: Company gross margin percentage was 68%, down slightly year over year, primarily driven by continued investments in AI infrastructure and growing AI product usage that was partially offset by ongoing efficiency gains, particularly in Azure and Microsoft Corporation 365 commercial cloud as well as sales mix shift to higher margin businesses. Operating expenses increased 5% in constant currency, driven by R and D investments in compute capacity and AI talent as well as impairment charges in our gaming business. Operating margins increased year over year to 47% ahead of expectations. As a reminder, we still account for investment in OpenAI under the equity method.
pairs.zh:
公司毛利率为68%，同比略有下降，主要受持续投资AI基础设施以及AI产品使用量增长的影响，这部分被持续的效率提升（尤其是在Azure和Microsoft Corporation 365商业云领域）以及销售组合向高利润率业务转移所部分抵消。按固定汇率计算，运营支出增长了5%，主要由于对计算能力和AI人才的研发投资，以及游戏业务的减值费用。运营利润率同比提升至47%，超出预期。需要提醒的是，我们仍将OpenAI的投资按权益法核算。

Company gross margin percentage was 68%, down slightly year over year, primarily driven by continued investments in AI infrastructure and growing AI product usage that was partially offset by ongoing efficiency gains, particularly in Azure and Microsoft Corporation 365 commercial cloud as well as sales mix shift to higher margin businesses. Operating expenses increased 5% in constant currency, driven by R and D investments in compute capacity and AI talent as well as impairment charges in our gaming business. Operating margins increased year over year to 47% ahead of expectations. As a reminder, we still account for investment in OpenAI under the equity method.

pairs.en: And as a result of OpenAI's recapitalization, we now record gains or losses based on our share of the change in their net assets on their balance sheet as opposed to our share of their operating profit or losses from their income statement. Therefore, we recorded a gain which drove other income and expense to $10 billion in our GAAP results. When adjusted for the OpenAI impact, other income and expense was slightly negative and lower than expected driven by net losses on investments. Capital expenditures were $37.5 billion in this quarter, roughly two-thirds of our CapEx, was on short-lived assets, primarily GPUs and CPUs. Our customer demand continues to exceed our supply.
pairs.zh:
由于OpenAI的资本重组，我们现在根据我们在其资产负债表上净资产变动中的份额来确认损益，而非根据我们在其利润表中经营利润或亏损中的份额。因此，我们确认了一项收益，这使得我们按GAAP准则计算的其他收入和支出达到了100亿美元。在剔除OpenAI的影响后，其他收入和支出略为负值，并因投资净亏损而低于预期。本季度资本支出为375亿美元，其中约三分之二的资本支出用于短期资产，主要是GPU和CPU。客户需求持续超过我们的供应能力。

And as a result of OpenAI's recapitalization, we now record gains or losses based on our share of the change in their net assets on their balance sheet as opposed to our share of their operating profit or losses from their income statement. Therefore, we recorded a gain which drove other income and expense to $10 billion in our GAAP results. When adjusted for the OpenAI impact, other income and expense was slightly negative and lower than expected driven by net losses on investments. Capital expenditures were $37.5 billion in this quarter, roughly two-thirds of our CapEx, was on short-lived assets, primarily GPUs and CPUs. Our customer demand continues to exceed our supply.

pairs.en: Therefore, we must balance the need to have our incoming supply better meet growing Azure demand with expanding first-party AI usage across services like Microsoft Corporation 365 Copilot and GitHub Copilot, increasing allocations to R and D teams to accelerate product innovation, and continued replacement of end-of-life server and networking equipment. The remaining spend was for long-lived assets that will support monetization for the next fifteen years and beyond. This quarter, total finance leases were $6.7 billion and were primarily for large data center sites. And cash paid for PP and E was $29.9 billion. Cash flow from operations was $35.8 billion, up 60% driven by strong cloud billings and collections.
pairs.zh:
因此，我们必须平衡以下需求：使我们的供应输入更好地满足不断增长的Azure需求，同时扩大Microsoft Corporation 365 Copilot和GitHub Copilot等服务的内部AI使用范围，增加对R and D团队的资源分配以加速产品创新，并持续替换生命周期结束的服务器和网络设备。剩余支出用于支持未来十五年及更长时间变现的长期资产。本季度，总融资租赁为67亿美元，主要用于大型数据中心场地。不动产、厂房及设备支付的现金为299亿美元。运营现金流为358亿美元，同比增长60%，主要得益于强劲的云服务开票和收款。

原文：
Therefore, we must balance the need to have our incoming supply better meet growing Azure demand with expanding first-party AI usage across services like Microsoft Corporation 365 Copilot and GitHub Copilot, increasing allocations to R and D teams to accelerate product innovation, and continued replacement of end-of-life server and networking equipment. The remaining spend was for long-lived assets that will support monetization for the next fifteen years and beyond. This quarter, total finance leases were $6.7 billion and were primarily for large data center sites. And cash paid for PP and E was $29.9 billion. Cash flow from operations was $35.8 billion, up 60% driven by strong cloud billings and collections.

pairs.en: And free cash flow was $5.9 billion and decreased sequentially, reflecting the higher cash capital expenditures from a lower mix of finance leases. And finally, we returned $12.7 billion to shareholders through dividend and share repurchases an increase of 32% year over year. Now to our commercial results. Commercial bookings increased 23% in constant currency driven by the previously large Azure commitment from OpenAI, reflects multiyear demand needs as well as the previously announced Anthropic commitment from November, and healthy growth across our core annuity sales motions. Commercial remaining performance obligation, continues to be reported net of reserves, increased to $625 billion.
pairs.zh:
自由现金流为59亿美元，环比下降，反映了融资租赁占比下降导致的现金资本支出增加。最后，我们通过股息和股票回购向股东返还了127亿美元，同比增长32%。接下来是我们的商业业绩。商业订单量按固定汇率计算增长了23%，这得益于此前OpenAI的大额Azure承诺，反映了多年期需求，以及此前宣布的Anthropic在11月的承诺，同时我们的核心年金销售活动实现了健康增长。商业剩余履约义务（继续按扣除准备金后的净额报告）增加至6250亿美元。

And free cash flow was $5.9 billion and decreased sequentially, reflecting the higher cash capital expenditures from a lower mix of finance leases. And finally, we returned $12.7 billion to shareholders through dividend and share repurchases an increase of 32% year over year. Now to our commercial results. Commercial bookings increased 23% in constant currency driven by the previously large Azure commitment from OpenAI, reflects multiyear demand needs as well as the previously announced Anthropic commitment from November, and healthy growth across our core annuity sales motions. Commercial remaining performance obligation, continues to be reported net of reserves, increased to $625 billion.

pairs.en: And was up 11% year over year with a weighted average duration of approximately two and a half years. Roughly 25% will be recognized in revenue in the next twelve months, up 39% year over year. The remaining portion recognized beyond the twelve months increased 15%. Approximately 45% of our commercial RPO balance is from OpenAI. The significant remaining balance grew 28% and reflects ongoing broad customer demand across the portfolio. Microsoft Corporation Cloud revenue was $51.5 billion grew 26% in constant currency. Microsoft Corporation Cloud gross margin percentage was slightly better than expected at 67% and down year over year due to continued investments in AI, that were partially offset by ongoing efficiency gains noted earlier.
pairs.zh:
同比增长11%，加权平均期限约为两年半。其中约25%将在未来12个月内确认为收入，同比增长39%。剩余部分在12个月后确认，增长了15%。我们的商业RPO余额中约45%来自OpenAI。剩余的重大余额增长了28%，反映出整个产品组合中持续广泛的客户需求。Microsoft Corporation Cloud收入为515亿美元，按固定汇率计算增长26%。Microsoft Corporation Cloud毛利率略好于预期，达到67%，但同比下降，原因是持续对AI的投资，这部分被之前提到的持续效率提升所部分抵消。

And was up 11% year over year with a weighted average duration of approximately two and a half years. Roughly 25% will be recognized in revenue in the next twelve months, up 39% year over year. The remaining portion recognized beyond the twelve months increased 15%. Approximately 45% of our commercial RPO balance is from OpenAI. The significant remaining balance grew 28% and reflects ongoing broad customer demand across the portfolio. Microsoft Corporation Cloud revenue was $51.5 billion grew 26% in constant currency. Microsoft Corporation Cloud gross margin percentage was slightly better than expected at 67% and down year over year due to continued investments in AI, that were partially offset by ongoing efficiency gains noted earlier.

pairs.en: Now to our segment results. Revenue from productivity and business processes was $34.1 billion and grew 16% in constant currency. Microsoft Corporation 365 commercial cloud revenue increased 17% in constant currency with consistent execution in the core business and increasing contribution from strong copilot results. ARPU growth was again led by e5 and Microsoft Corporation 365 copilot. And paid Microsoft Corporation 365 commercial seats grew 6% year over year to over 450 million. With installed base expansion across all customer segments though primarily in our small and medium business and frontline worker offerings. Microsoft Corporation 365 commercial products revenue increased 13% in constant currency ahead of expectations due to higher than expected office 2024 transactional purchasing.
pairs.zh:
现在来看我们的业务分部业绩。生产力与业务流程收入为341亿美元，按固定汇率计算增长16%。Microsoft Corporation 365商业云收入按固定汇率计算增长17%，核心业务执行稳健，且强劲的Copilot成果贡献持续增加。ARPU增长再次由E5和Microsoft Corporation 365 Copilot带动。付费Microsoft Corporation 365商业席位同比增长6%，超过4.5亿个。所有客户细分市场的安装基础均有所扩大，主要来自中小企业和一线员工产品。Microsoft Corporation 365商业产品收入按固定汇率计算增长13%，超出预期，原因是Office 2024交易性购买高于预期。

Now to our segment results. Revenue from productivity and business processes was $34.1 billion and grew 16% in constant currency. Microsoft Corporation 365 commercial cloud revenue increased 17% in constant currency with consistent execution in the core business and increasing contribution from strong copilot results. ARPU growth was again led by e5 and Microsoft Corporation 365 copilot. And paid Microsoft Corporation 365 commercial seats grew 6% year over year to over 450 million. With installed base expansion across all customer segments though primarily in our small and medium business and frontline worker offerings. Microsoft Corporation 365 commercial products revenue increased 13% in constant currency ahead of expectations due to higher than expected office 2024 transactional purchasing.

pairs.en: Microsoft Corporation 365 consumer cloud revenue increased 29% in constant currency, again driven by ARPU growth. Microsoft Corporation 365 consumer subscriptions grew 6%. LinkedIn revenue increased 11% in constant currency, driven by marketing solutions. Dynamics 365 revenue increased 19% constant currency with continued growth across all workloads. Segment gross margin dollars increased 17% in constant currency, and gross margin percentage increased again driven by efficiency gains at Microsoft Corporation 365 commercial cloud, that were partially offset by continued investments in AI. Including the impact of growing Copilot usage. Operating expenses increased 6% in constant currency, and operating income increased 22% in constant currency. Operating margins increased year over year to 60%.
pairs.zh:
Microsoft Corporation 365 消费者云收入按固定汇率计算增长 29%，再次由 ARPU 增长驱动。Microsoft Corporation 365 消费者订阅增长 6%。LinkedIn 收入按固定汇率计算增长 11%，由营销解决方案驱动。Dynamics 365 收入按固定汇率计算增长 19%，所有工作负载持续增长。分部毛利率按固定汇率计算增长 17%，毛利率百分比再次提升，得益于 Microsoft Corporation 365 商业云的效率提升，部分被 AI 持续投资所抵消。包括 Copilot 使用增长的影响。运营费用按固定汇率计算增长 6%，运营收入按固定汇率计算增长 22%。运营利润率同比提升至 60%。

Microsoft Corporation 365 consumer cloud revenue increased 29% in constant currency, again driven by ARPU growth. Microsoft Corporation 365 consumer subscriptions grew 6%. LinkedIn revenue increased 11% in constant currency, driven by marketing solutions. Dynamics 365 revenue increased 19% constant currency with continued growth across all workloads. Segment gross margin dollars increased 17% in constant currency, and gross margin percentage increased again driven by efficiency gains at Microsoft Corporation 365 commercial cloud, that were partially offset by continued investments in AI. Including the impact of growing Copilot usage. Operating expenses increased 6% in constant currency, and operating income increased 22% in constant currency. Operating margins increased year over year to 60%.

pairs.en: Driven by improved operating leverage as well as the higher gross margins noted earlier. Next, intelligent cloud segment. Revenue was $32.9 billion and grew 29% in constant currency. In Azure and other cloud services, revenue grew 39% in constant currency, slightly ahead of expectations with ongoing efficiency gains across our fungible fleet enabling us to reallocate some capacity to Azure that was monetized in the quarter. As mentioned earlier, continue to see strong demand across workloads, customer segments, and geographic regions, and demand continues to exceed available supply. In our on-premises server business, revenue increased 21% in constant currency ahead of expectations driven by demand for our hybrid solutions including a benefit from the launch of SQL Server 2025.
pairs.zh:
得益于运营杠杆的改善以及前述更高的毛利润率。接下来是智能云板块。营收为329亿美元，按固定汇率计算增长29%。在Azure及其他云服务中，营收按固定汇率增长39%，略高于预期，我们的可互换资产组合持续提升效率，使得部分产能得以重新调配至Azure，并在本季度实现变现。如前所述，各工作负载、客户群体和地理区域的需求依然强劲，且需求持续超过可用供应。在本地服务器业务中，按固定汇率计算营收增长21%，高于预期，主要得益于混合解决方案的需求，其中包括SQL Server 2025发布带来的利好。

Driven by improved operating leverage as well as the higher gross margins noted earlier. Next, intelligent cloud segment. Revenue was $32.9 billion and grew 29% in constant currency. In Azure and other cloud services, revenue grew 39% in constant currency, slightly ahead of expectations with ongoing efficiency gains across our fungible fleet enabling us to reallocate some capacity to Azure that was monetized in the quarter. As mentioned earlier, continue to see strong demand across workloads, customer segments, and geographic regions, and demand continues to exceed available supply. In our on-premises server business, revenue increased 21% in constant currency ahead of expectations driven by demand for our hybrid solutions including a benefit from the launch of SQL Server 2025.

pairs.en: As well as higher transactional purchasing ahead of memory price increases. Segment gross margin dollars increased 20% in constant currency. Gross margin percentage decreased year over year driven by continued investments in AI and sales mix shift to Azure, partially offset by efficiency gains in Azure. Operating expenses increased 3% in constant currency, and operating income grew 28% in constant currency. Operating margins were 42%. Down slightly year over year as increased investments in AI were mostly offset by improved operating leverage. Now to more personal computing. Revenue was $14.3 billion and declined 3%. Windows OEM and devices revenue increased 1% and was relatively unchanged in constant currency.
pairs.zh:
以及因内存价格上涨前的交易性采购增加。按固定汇率计算，分部毛利率美元金额增长20%。毛利率百分比同比下降，原因是对AI的持续投资以及销售组合向Azure转移，部分被Azure的效率提升所抵消。按固定汇率计算，运营费用增长3%，营业收入增长28%。运营利润率为42%。同比略有下降，因为对AI的投资增加大部分被运营杠杆改善所抵消。现在来看个人计算业务。营收为143亿美元，下降3%。Windows OEM和设备收入增长1%，按固定汇率计算相对持平。

As well as higher transactional purchasing ahead of memory price increases. Segment gross margin dollars increased 20% in constant currency. Gross margin percentage decreased year over year driven by continued investments in AI and sales mix shift to Azure, partially offset by efficiency gains in Azure. Operating expenses increased 3% in constant currency, and operating income grew 28% in constant currency. Operating margins were 42%. Down slightly year over year as increased investments in AI were mostly offset by improved operating leverage. Now to more personal computing. Revenue was $14.3 billion and declined 3%. Windows OEM and devices revenue increased 1% and was relatively unchanged in constant currency.

pairs.en: Windows OEM grew 5% with strong execution as well as a continued benefit from Windows 10 end of support. Results were ahead of expectations as inventory levels remained elevated with increased purchasing ahead of memory price increases. Search and news advertising revenue ex-TAC increased 10% in constant currency, slightly below expectations driven by some execution challenges. As expected, the sequential growth rate moderated as the benefit from third-party partnerships normalized. And in gaming, revenue decreased 9% in constant currency. Xbox content and services revenue decreased 5% in constant currency, and was below expectations driven by first-party content with impact across the platform.
pairs.zh:
Windows OEM增长5%，得益于强劲的执行力以及Windows 10停止支持的持续利好。业绩超出预期，因内存价格上涨前采购增加导致库存水平居高不下。搜索与新闻广告收入（不含TAC）按固定汇率计算增长10%，略低于预期，主要受部分执行挑战影响。如预期所料，随着第三方合作伙伴关系带来的收益趋于正常，环比增速有所放缓。游戏业务方面，按固定汇率计算收入下降9%。Xbox内容与服务收入按固定汇率计算下降5%，低于预期，主要受第一方内容影响，且该影响波及整个平台。

原文：
Windows OEM grew 5% with strong execution as well as a continued benefit from Windows 10 end of support. Results were ahead of expectations as inventory levels remained elevated with increased purchasing ahead of memory price increases. Search and news advertising revenue ex-TAC increased 10% in constant currency, slightly below expectations driven by some execution challenges. As expected, the sequential growth rate moderated as the benefit from third-party partnerships normalized. And in gaming, revenue decreased 9% in constant currency. Xbox content and services revenue decreased 5% in constant currency, and was below expectations driven by first-party content with impact across the platform.

pairs.en: Segment gross margin dollars increased 2% in constant currency, and gross margin percentage increased year over year driven by sales mix shift to higher margin businesses. Operating expenses increased 5% in constant currency driven by the impairment charges in our gaming business noted earlier, as well as R and D investments in compute capacity and AI talent. Operating income decreased 3% in constant currency, and operating margins were relatively unchanged year over year at 27%. As higher operating expenses were mostly offset by higher gross margins. Now moving to our Q3 outlook, which unless specifically noted otherwise, is on a US dollar basis. Based on current rates, we expect FX to increase total revenue growth by three points.
pairs.zh:
按固定汇率计算，分部毛利润美元金额增长2%，毛利润率同比上升，主要得益于销售组合转向利润率更高的业务。运营费用按固定汇率计算增长5%，主要是由于之前提到的游戏业务减值费用，以及对计算能力和AI人才的研发投资。运营收入按固定汇率计算下降3%，运营利润率同比基本持平，为27%，因为较高的运营费用大部分被较高的毛利润所抵消。接下来进入第三季度展望，除非另有说明，否则均以美元为基础。根据当前汇率，我们预计外汇将推动总收入增长提高三个百分点。

Segment gross margin dollars increased 2% in constant currency, and gross margin percentage increased year over year driven by sales mix shift to higher margin businesses. Operating expenses increased 5% in constant currency driven by the impairment charges in our gaming business noted earlier, as well as R and D investments in compute capacity and AI talent. Operating income decreased 3% in constant currency, and operating margins were relatively unchanged year over year at 27%. As higher operating expenses were mostly offset by higher gross margins. Now moving to our Q3 outlook, which unless specifically noted otherwise, is on a US dollar basis. Based on current rates, we expect FX to increase total revenue growth by three points.

pairs.en: Within the segments, we expect FX to increase revenue growth by four points in productivity and business processes and two points in intelligent cloud and more personal computing. We expect FX to increase COGS, and operating expense growth by two points. As a reminder, this impact is due to the exchange rates a year ago. Starting with the total company. We expect revenue of $80.65 to $81.75 billion or growth of 15 to 17% with continued strong growth across our commercial businesses. Partially offset by our consumer businesses.
pairs.zh:
在各个细分市场中，我们预计外汇将使生产力和业务流程的收入增长提高四个百分点，使智能云和个人计算收入增长提高两个百分点。我们预计外汇将使销售成本及运营费用增长提高两个百分点。提醒一下，这一影响源于一年前的汇率水平。首先从公司整体来看，我们预计收入为805.65亿至817.5亿美元，同比增长15%至17%，商业业务持续强劲增长，部分被消费者业务所抵消。

Within the segments, we expect FX to increase revenue growth by four points in productivity and business processes and two points in intelligent cloud and more personal computing. We expect FX to increase COGS, and operating expense growth by two points. As a reminder, this impact is due to the exchange rates a year ago. Starting with the total company. We expect revenue of $80.65 to $81.75 billion or growth of 15 to 17% with continued strong growth across our commercial businesses. Partially offset by our consumer businesses.

pairs.en: We expect COGS of $26.65 to $26.85 billion, growth of 22 to 23%, and operating expense of $17.8 to $17.9 billion or growth of 10 to 11% driven by continued investment in R and D, AI compute capacity, and talent. Against a low prior year comparable. Operating margins should be down slightly year over year. Excluding any impact from our investments in OpenAI, other income and expense is expected to be roughly $700 million driven by a fair market gain in our equity portfolio and interest income partially offset by interest expense which includes the interest payments related to data center leases. And we expect our adjusted Q3 effective tax rate to be approximately 19%.
pairs.zh:
我们预期COGS在266.5亿至268.5亿美元之间，增长22%至23%；运营费用在178亿至179亿美元之间，增长10%至11%，这得益于对研发、AI计算能力和人才的持续投入。由于上年同期基数较低，运营利润率同比应略有下降。排除我们投资OpenAI的影响，其他收入和费用预计约为7亿美元，主要由我们股票投资组合的公允市场收益和利息收入驱动，部分被利息支出（包括与数据中心租赁相关的利息支付）所抵消。我们预计调整后的第三季度有效税率约为19%。

We expect COGS of $26.65 to $26.85 billion, growth of 22 to 23%, and operating expense of $17.8 to $17.9 billion or growth of 10 to 11% driven by continued investment in R and D, AI compute capacity, and talent. Against a low prior year comparable. Operating margins should be down slightly year over year. Excluding any impact from our investments in OpenAI, other income and expense is expected to be roughly $700 million driven by a fair market gain in our equity portfolio and interest income partially offset by interest expense which includes the interest payments related to data center leases. And we expect our adjusted Q3 effective tax rate to be approximately 19%.

pairs.en: Next, we expect capital expenditures to decrease on a sequential basis due to a normal variability from cloud infrastructure build-outs and the timing of delivery of finance leases. As we work to close the gap between demand and supply, we expect the mix of short-lived assets to remain similar to Q2. Now our commercial business. In commercial bookings, we expect healthy growth in the core business on a growing expiry base when adjusted for the OpenAI contracts in the prior year. As a reminder, the significant OpenAI contract signed in Q2 represents multiyear demand needs from them, which will result in some quarterly volatility in both bookings and RPO growth rates going forward.
pairs.zh:
接下来，我们预计资本支出将环比下降，原因是云基础设施建设的正常波动以及融资租赁交付时间的影响。在我们努力缩小供需差距的过程中，预计短期资产的构成将与第二季度保持相似。现在来看我们的商业业务。在商业预订方面，若剔除上年OpenAI合同的影响，基于不断增长的到期基数，我们预计核心业务将实现健康增长。需要提醒的是，第二季度签署的重大OpenAI合同代表了他们多年的需求，这将导致未来预订量和RPO增长率出现一些季度波动。

原文：Next, we expect capital expenditures to decrease on a sequential basis due to a normal variability from cloud infrastructure build-outs and the timing of delivery of finance leases. As we work to close the gap between demand and supply, we expect the mix of short-lived assets to remain similar to Q2. Now our commercial business. In commercial bookings, we expect healthy growth in the core business on a growing expiry base when adjusted for the OpenAI contracts in the prior year. As a reminder, the significant OpenAI contract signed in Q2 represents multiyear demand needs from them, which will result in some quarterly volatility in both bookings and RPO growth rates going forward.

pairs.en: Microsoft Corporation cloud gross margin percentage should be roughly 65% down year over year driven by continued investments in AI. Now to segment guidance. In productivity and business processes, we expect revenue of $34.25 to $34.55 billion or growth of 14 to 15%. In Microsoft Corporation 365 commercial cloud, we expect revenue growth to be between 13 to 14% in constant currency with continued stability in year-over-year growth rates on a large and expanding base. Accelerating copilot momentum, and ongoing e5 adoption will again drive ARPU growth. Microsoft Corporation 365 commercial products revenue should decline in the low single digits down sequentially assuming office 2024 transactional purchasing trends normalize.
pairs.zh:
Microsoft Corporation云毛利率预计约为65%，同比下降，这得益于持续的人工智能投资。接下来是各业务板块的业绩指引。在生产力和业务流程领域，我们预计收入为342.5亿至345.5亿美元，增长率达14%至15%。在Microsoft Corporation 365商业云领域，我们预计按固定汇率计算的收入增长将在13%至14%之间，基于庞大且不断扩大的基数，同比增长率保持稳定。加速的Copilot发展势头以及持续的E5采用将再次推动ARPU增长。Microsoft Corporation 365商业产品收入预计将出现低个位数环比下降，假设Office 2024交易购买趋势恢复正常。

原文：
Microsoft Corporation cloud gross margin percentage should be roughly 65% down year over year driven by continued investments in AI. Now to segment guidance. In productivity and business processes, we expect revenue of $34.25 to $34.55 billion or growth of 14 to 15%. In Microsoft Corporation 365 commercial cloud, we expect revenue growth to be between 13 to 14% in constant currency with continued stability in year-over-year growth rates on a large and expanding base. Accelerating copilot momentum, and ongoing e5 adoption will again drive ARPU growth. Microsoft Corporation 365 commercial products revenue should decline in the low single digits down sequentially assuming office 2024 transactional purchasing trends normalize.

pairs.en: As a reminder, Microsoft Corporation 365 commercial products include components that can be variable due to in-period revenue recognition dynamics. Microsoft Corporation 365 consumer cloud revenue growth should be in the mid to high 20% range driven by growth at ARPU as well as continued subscription volume. For LinkedIn, we expect revenue growth to be in the low double digits. And in Dynamics 365, we expect revenue growth to be in the high teens with continued growth across all workloads. For intelligent cloud, we expect revenue of $34.1 to $34.4 billion or growth of 27 to 29%. In Azure, we expect Q3 revenue growth to be between 37 to 38% in constant currency against a prior year comparable that included.
pairs.zh:
需要提醒的是，Microsoft Corporation 365商业产品包含一些可能因期内收入确认动态而变化的组件。Microsoft Corporation 365消费者云收入增长率预计在20%中高位区间，由ARPU增长和订阅量持续增长驱动。对于LinkedIn，我们预计收入增长率在低两位数。在Dynamics 365方面，我们预计收入增长率将达到高十几，所有工作负载持续增长。对于智能云，我们预计收入为341亿至344亿美元，即增长27%至29%。在Azure中，我们预计第三季度收入增长率按固定汇率计算将在37%至38%之间，而去年同期包括。

As a reminder, Microsoft Corporation 365 commercial products include components that can be variable due to in-period revenue recognition dynamics. Microsoft Corporation 365 consumer cloud revenue growth should be in the mid to high 20% range driven by growth at ARPU as well as continued subscription volume. For LinkedIn, we expect revenue growth to be in the low double digits. And in Dynamics 365, we expect revenue growth to be in the high teens with continued growth across all workloads. For intelligent cloud, we expect revenue of $34.1 to $34.4 billion or growth of 27 to 29%. In Azure, we expect Q3 revenue growth to be between 37 to 38% in constant currency against a prior year comparable that included.

pairs.en: As mentioned earlier, demand continues to exceed supply. Significantly accelerating growth rates in both Q3 and Q4. And we will need to continue to balance the incoming supply we can allocate here against other priorities. As a reminder, there can be quarterly variability in year-on-year growth rates depending on timing of capacity delivery. And when it comes online, as well as from in-period revenue recognition depending on the mix of contracts. In our on-premises server business, we expect revenue to decline in the low single digits as growth rate normalize. Following the launch of SQL Server 2025, though increased memory pricing could create additional volatility in transactional purchasing.
pairs.zh:
如前所述，需求持续超过供给。第三季度和第四季度的增长率显著加快。我们需要持续平衡可分配于此的新增产能与其他优先事项。提醒一下，受产能交付时间及其上线时间影响，同比增长率可能出现季度波动，同时收入确认也会因合同组合的不同而存在期内差异。在本地服务器业务方面，随着增长率回归常态，我们预计收入将出现低个位数下降。SQL Server 2025发布后，内存定价上调可能会进一步加剧交易采购的波动性。

As mentioned earlier, demand continues to exceed supply. Significantly accelerating growth rates in both Q3 and Q4. And we will need to continue to balance the incoming supply we can allocate here against other priorities. As a reminder, there can be quarterly variability in year-on-year growth rates depending on timing of capacity delivery. And when it comes online, as well as from in-period revenue recognition depending on the mix of contracts. In our on-premises server business, we expect revenue to decline in the low single digits as growth rate normalize. Following the launch of SQL Server 2025, though increased memory pricing could create additional volatility in transactional purchasing.

pairs.en: In more personal computing, we expect revenue to be $12.3 to $12.8 billion. Windows OEM and devices revenue should decline in the low teens. Growth rates will be impacted as the benefit from Windows 10 and support normalizes, and as elevated inventory levels come down through the quarter. Therefore, Windows OEM revenue should decline roughly 10%. The range of potential outcomes remains wider than normal, in part due to the potential impact on the PC market from increased memory pricing. Search and news advertising ex-TAC revenue growth should be in the high single digits. Even as we work to improve execution, we expect continued share gains across Bing and Edge with growth driven by volume.
pairs.zh:
在个人计算领域，我们预计营收在123亿至128亿美元之间。Windows OEM和设备营收应出现低两位数百分比的下降。随着Windows 10及支持服务的收益效应趋于正常化，以及库存水平在本季度内从高位回落，增长率将受到影响。因此，Windows OEM营收预计下降约10%。潜在结果的范围仍比正常情况更宽，部分原因是内存价格上涨对PC市场的潜在影响。搜索与新闻广告（扣除流量获取成本）营收增长应在高个位数百分比。即使在努力改善执行力的同时，我们预计Bing和Edge将继续抢占市场份额，增长由流量驱动。

原文：
In more personal computing, we expect revenue to be $12.3 to $12.8 billion. Windows OEM and devices revenue should decline in the low teens. Growth rates will be impacted as the benefit from Windows 10 and support normalizes, and as elevated inventory levels come down through the quarter. Therefore, Windows OEM revenue should decline roughly 10%. The range of potential outcomes remains wider than normal, in part due to the potential impact on the PC market from increased memory pricing. Search and news advertising ex-TAC revenue growth should be in the high single digits. Even as we work to improve execution, we expect continued share gains across Bing and Edge with growth driven by volume.

pairs.en: And we expect sequential growth moderation as the contribution from third-party partnerships continues to normalize. And Xbox content and services, we expect revenue decline in the mid-single digits against a prior year comparable that benefited from strong content performance, partially offset by growth in Xbox Game Pass. And hardware revenue should decline year over year. Now some additional thoughts on the rest of the fiscal year and beyond. First, FX. Based on current rates, we expect FX to increase Q4 total revenue and COGS growth by less than one point with no impact to operating expense growth.
pairs.zh:
我们预计随着第三方合作伙伴的贡献持续正常化，环比增长将有所放缓。在Xbox内容和服务方面，我们预计收入将出现中等个位数的下降，而去年同期则受益于强劲的内容表现，这一下降部分被Xbox Game Pass的增长所抵消。硬件收入应同比下降。现在谈谈本财年剩余时间及以后的一些额外想法。首先是外汇。基于当前汇率，我们预计外汇将使第四季度总收入和销售成本增长增加不到一个百分点，对运营费用增长没有影响。

And we expect sequential growth moderation as the contribution from third-party partnerships continues to normalize. And Xbox content and services, we expect revenue decline in the mid-single digits against a prior year comparable that benefited from strong content performance, partially offset by growth in Xbox Game Pass. And hardware revenue should decline year over year. Now some additional thoughts on the rest of the fiscal year and beyond. First, FX. Based on current rates, we expect FX to increase Q4 total revenue and COGS growth by less than one point with no impact to operating expense growth.

pairs.en: Within the segments, we expect FX to increase revenue growth by roughly one point in productivity and business processes and more personal computing and less than one point in intelligent cloud. With the strong work delivered in H1 to prioritize investment in key growth areas and the favorable impact from a higher mix of revenue in our Windows OEM and commercial on-prem businesses we now expect FY '26 operating margins to be up slightly. We mentioned the potential impact on Windows OEM and on-premises server markets, from increased memory pricing earlier. In addition, rising memory prices would impact capital expenditures, though the impact on Microsoft Corporation cloud gross margins will build more gradually. As these assets depreciate over six years.

pairs.en: Because as we spend the capital and put GPUs specifically, it applies to but GPUs more specifically, we're really making long-term decisions. pairs.en: Then when you end up is that you end up with the remainder going towards serving the Azure capacity that continues to grow in terms of demand. pairs.en: Mark Moerdler:Thank you very much for taking my question. And congrats on the quarter. Of the other questions we believe investors want to understand is how to think about your line of sight from hardware CapEx investment to revenue and margins. You capitalize servers over six years, but the average duration of your RPO is two and a half years, up from two years last quarter. How do investors get comfortable that since this is a lot of this CapEx is AI centric, that you'll be able to capture sufficient revenue over the six-year use life of the hardware to deliver solid revenue and gross profit dollars growth. Hopefully, one similar to the CPU revenue. Thank you.
pairs.zh:

pairs.zh:
事实上，每当我们考虑扩充舰队规模时，我们都会从比率的角度来思考。即便是训练任务——顺便一提，AI训练任务需要大量的算力和与算力紧密耦合的存储。因此，推理任务也是如此。在智能体模式下进行推理时，本质上需要为智能体配备计算资源或计算单元。因此，它们并非不需要GPU，它们确实运行在GPU上，但它们需要的是包含算力和存储的计算设备。这就是新世界正在发生的事情。你提到的另一个问题是，云迁移仍在进行中。

In fact, whenever we think about even the building out of the fleet, we think of in ratios. So in inferencing with agent mode, would require you to essentially provision a computer, or computing resources to the agent. So not they don't need GPUs. They're running on GPUs, but they need computers, which are compute and storage. So that's what's happening even in the new world. The other thing you mentioned is the cloud migrations are still going on.
